title: Citrusy Juicy Zanzibari Beets Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly, citrus-infused stir-fry featuring beets that are gently cooked to retain their natural sweetness and vibrant color.
instructions: Wash and peel beets. Cut into thin strips.
Peel scallions, cut in half lengthwise then slice thinly.
Combine soy sauce, vinegar, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl to make the sauce.
In a large wok or skillet, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add beets and stir-fry until slightly softened, about 5 minutes.
Add scallions and ginger. Stir-fry for another minute.
Pour in the sauce and toss everything together to combine. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until beets are tender but still crisp.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds before serving.
